title: Build timestamp correlator (audio + clicks + screenshots)
description: Given a session's transcript.json and clicks.json, correlate audio timestamps with click timestamps to create a unified timeline. For each click, find what was being said at that moment. For each transcript segment, find what was on screen. Output: a merged timeline JSON that the analysis engine can consume. Include screenshot references at each point.

substeps.title: Create lib/correlator.js with cross-referencing of clicks and transcript
substeps.notes: Pure function, handles clicks-only, transcript-only, both, null, and error cases

substeps.title: Integrate correlator into pipeline-run.js Step 2
substeps.notes: Fetches S3 data, calls correlate(), writes output/timeline.json

substeps.title: Unit tests covering all 5 spec tests (31 assertions)
Add screenshot matching by timestamp (binary search, 5s window)
Add engagement scoring 0-10 (click freq, visitor speech, questions, duration, topics)
substeps.notes: computeEngagement weighted formula, output as engagement_score field

substeps.title: Add product topic detection (12 V1 categories from URLs, titles, DOM, speech)
substeps.notes: detectTopics scans all event text, returns ranked topics with evidence sources

tests: Click at 00:05:30 + transcript entry at 00:05:28 -> correctly correlated
Screenshots referenced in timeline exist in S3
Session with no clicks (audio only) -> timeline still valid
Session with no audio (clicks only) -> timeline still valid
